title: Fresh Citrus Moroccan Sweet Potato Bowl
description: A bright, springy bowl of pressure‑cooked sweet potatoes with a zesty orange‑lemon dressing, toasted almond butter, and fresh herbs, perfect for a quick low‑sodium lunch.
instructions: Dice the sweet potatoes and set aside.
Heat the olive oil in the pressure cooker, then add the diced sweet potatoes and Moroccan spice mix and stir for 1 minute.
Pour in the vegetable broth, orange zest, lemon zest, orange juice, and lemon juice, then seal the pressure cooker and cook on high pressure for 5 minutes.
Release the pressure and remove the lid, letting the sweet potatoes sit to cool slightly.
In a mason jar, layer the cooked sweet potatoes, rinsed chickpeas, a drizzle of amlou, and chopped mint and cilantro.
Shake the jar gently to mix the flavors and serve immediately.
Optionally, add a splash of extra orange or lemon juice for extra brightness.
Enjoy the bowl as a wholesome, low‑sodium lunch.
